tool_outputs.output: NO_ACCOUNT: No account is linked to this session. Please visit your nearest branch or contact the helpline to open an account or link an existing one.

response: It seems that no account is linked to this session. To resolve the issue with your frozen account, please visit your nearest Horizon Bank branch or contact our helpline at 1800-XXX-XXXX (Toll-free, 24x7) for assistance. They will be able to help you with the necessary steps to unfreeze your account.
